name: Fusspots Cafe
tagline: A cosy country café on Waterfall Way.
description:
Located in the beautiful village of Ebor on the famous Waterfall Way, Fusspots Cafe is a favourite stop for locals and travellers alike.

Known for freshly brewed coffee, homemade cakes, hearty breakfasts and warm country hospitality, the café provides a relaxing place to unwind before or after visiting Ebor Falls.

Whether you're passing through on a road trip or spending time exploring the New England region, Fusspots Cafe offers delicious food, friendly service and a welcoming atmosphere.
shortDescription: Freshly brewed coffee, homemade cakes & hearty breakfasts on the Waterfall Way, Ebor NSW.

aboutFeatures.title: Fresh & Honest Food
aboutFeatures.description: Simple, quality ingredients prepared fresh each morning.

aboutFeatures.title: Warm Country Welcome
aboutFeatures.description: Friendly, genuine service in a relaxed atmosphere that feels like home.

aboutFeatures.title: Local Favourite
aboutFeatures.description: A beloved stop for locals and travellers exploring the Ebor region.

seo.title: Fusspots Cafe | Breakfast & Coffee in Ebor NSW
seo.description: Located on the Waterfall Way in Ebor NSW, Fusspots Cafe serves freshly brewed coffee, homemade cakes and hearty breakfasts. The perfect stop near Ebor Falls. Open Mon, Thu–Sun.
